title: Prima Set Of 2 Heart Shaped Cake Tins, Romantic Grey Heart Shape, Non Stick Carbon Steel Bake Pan, Ideal For Cakes, Cheesecakes & Loaves, Black
features: Set of 2 Prima heart shape cake pan.
Make the perfect cake for someone you care about with this lovely heart shaped cake pan. Made from carbon steel and finished with a non-stick easy clean coating, the pan makes baking an easy task.

Measuring 23cm x 22.5cm x 3.7cm, the pan gives you a generous sized baking area for a generous sized cake. Not only is the pan ideal for cakes, it could also be used to make a delicious cheesecake, fruit loaf, banana loaf or even a tasty pie!
Strong and durable for your everyday needs and fully dishwasher safe, this pan is a must have to add to your bakeware collection.
